topics.title: Musical Collaborations and Radio Segment History
topics.summary: The studio explores past musical collaborations with Rob Zombie, the history of listener song parodies, and the logistics of managing various radio segments.

topics.title: Upcoming Show Specials and Radio Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming program specials, including a retrospective on Jackie Martin and the history of the show, before transitioning into stories about interactions with Bubba, Rodney Dangerfield, and Steven Van Zandt.

topics.title: Artie's Personal Struggles and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation regarding Artie’s personal habits, his relationship with his mother, and critiques of various media figures and public scandals.

topics.title: Organization Habits and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio explores the benefits of using a planner to manage daily tasks while discussing recent television plot spoilers and personal anecdotes regarding public appearances.

topics.title: Graphic Medical Photos of a Listener's Surgery
topics.summary: The studio reacts to graphic photos sent by a caller who underwent surgery on his buttocks.

topics.title: Hospital Discharge and Political Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of discharging a patient with severe injuries who lacks self-care skills, followed by a debate on presidential term limits, internet regulation, and Michael Bloomberg's potential candidacy.

topics.title: Political Term Limits and Celebrity Disputes
topics.summary: The studio explores the implications of presidential term limits, the influence of political machines in local governance, and a heated dispute regarding personal ties to Anna Nicole Smith.

topics.title: China Discusses Film Career and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses her role in the film Illegal Aliens, her experiences working with Anna Nicole Smith, and her history of being estranged from her family.

topics.title: Chyna Doll and Guest Appearances
topics.summary: The show features Chyna Doll promoting her Las Vegas residency while interacting with fans and discussing personal experiences.

topics.title: Interview with a Go-Go Dancer
topics.summary: The show features an interview with a dancer from New Jersey who discusses her career, her personal life, and her interest in the host.

topics.title: Interaction with a Female Caller
topics.summary: The show features a conversation with a woman who shares stories about her work in a club and expresses an attraction to the host.

topics.title: Spelling Contest and Animal Rescue
topics.summary: The studio features a spelling bee for a trip prize, followed by a segment with a representative from the North Shore Animal League discussing the rescue of limbless chihuahuas.

topics.title: Pet Ownership and Animal Rescue
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of managing multiple pets in an apartment, the role of mobile adoption units, and a listener's request for help rehoming several cats.

topics.title: News Segment Highlights
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of news stories including the arrest of a man for stealing women's underwear, the discovery of shark reproduction without males, the funeral of Jerry Falwell, and allegations involving a police officer and a porn star.

topics.title: Current Events and Entertainment News
topics.summary: The studio covers topics ranging from the execution of a football fan and Iraq troop funding debates to American Idol performances, celebrity news involving Paula Abdul and Angelina Jolie, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
